conversations.content: How much did I spend on shopping today?

<function_thought>
To determine how much Emma spent on shopping today, the first step is to get the current date. This will allow us to filter shopping expenses correctly. Once we have the current date, I will retrieve the order history for that date to summarize the spending. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
Now that we have retrieved the current date as '2024-05-19', the next step is to view Emma's order history to check for any purchases made on this date. This will help determine how much she spent on shopping today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>
